battleTraits.name: Delusions and Madness
battleTraits.description: At the start of each round, roll a die and gain a buff: 1-2: +1 Save, 3-4: +1 to Run and Charge, 5-6: +1 to Hit rolls.

regimentAbilities.name: Sound the Pursuit
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit. That unit can roll 3D6 for charge rolls until next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Unholy Chorus
regimentAbilities.description: Pick an enemy unit within 12". Reduce that unit's Control characteristic by 1 until end of turn.
